steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best emphasizes a difference between the two lighthouse keepers. That means the correct answer must explicitly contrast Lusby and Austin — not just describe one, and not highlight a similarity.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'similarity': emphasizes what the keepers had in common rather than a difference. ✗
  • Choice B — 'only Lusby': describes only one keeper, so no contrast is drawn between them. ✗
  • Choice C — 'earlier century': directly compares the two keepers — Lusby served in an earlier century than Austin, an explicit contrast supported by the notes (Lusby: 1844–1862; Austin: 1925–1941). ✓
  • Choice D — 'only Austin': describes only one keeper, so no contrast is drawn between them. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
